tools.name: search_patents
tools.description:
Search worldwide patents by keyword, inventor, assignee, or phrase using Google Patents.
Returns patent id, title, assignee, inventor, filing/publication dates, and a snippet.

Args:
    query: Free-text query (e.g. "quantum error correction", "lithium battery anode").
    max_results: Maximum numbe

tools.name: get_patent_details
tools.description:
Look up a specific patent by its publication number and return its metadata.

Args:
    patent_id: Patent publication number (e.g. "US9876543B2", "EP1234567A1", "WO2020123456A1").

tools.name: find_patents_by_assignee
tools.description:
Find patents owned by a company or organization (assignee). Useful for IP portfolio and
competitive-intelligence research.

Args:
    assignee: Company / organization name (e.g. "NVIDIA", "Genentech", "Samsung Electronics").
    max_results: Maximum number of patents to return (1-30, default 15).

tools.name: search_inventor
tools.description:
Find patents by a named inventor. Useful for talent/expert discovery and prior-art research.

Args:
    inventor: Inventor full name (e.g. "John Carmack", "Shinya Yamanaka").
    max_results: Maximum number of patents to return (1-30, default 15).
